title: GPT-5.5 is a total freak
summary: The AI Search channel presents a review of OpenAI's GPT-5.5, claiming it is exceptional. The video demonstrates the model's capabilities across diverse tasks including code generation, 3D rendering, cancer detection, music composition, and deep research, while also addressing hallucination issues and providing performance benchmarks.
